title: Update enter_rx_mode and _get_rx_result_internal in simulation.py to use synchronized_hop_channel instead of setting current_channel
description: Modify RX methods to derive channel from hop_schedule via synchronized_hop_channel for rendezvous. Update node.current_channel usage only where necessary. Ensure _get_rx_result_internal passes correct channel to medium.get_rx_candidates. Follow no-dead-code rule. Update docstrings with references.
